com.pax.poslink

Class ManageRequest.CustomMACInformation

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.CustomMACInformation
  • Enclosing class:
    ManageRequest

    public static class ManageRequest.CustomMACInformation
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String Data
      Data to be encrypted.
      java.lang.String KeySlot
      Key slot for encryption.
      java.lang.String KeyType
      The type of the key which is used to calculate MAC value:
      0 – TAK
      1 – DES DUKPT MAC
      2 – AES DUKPT MAC
      3 – HMAC
      java.lang.String WorkMode
      MAC calculation mode:
      0 - ANSI X9.9
      1 - Hypercomm Fast Mode
      2 - ANSI X9.19.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CustomMACInformation() 

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • KeyType

        public java.lang.String KeyType
        The type of the key which is used to calculate MAC value:
        0 – TAK
        1 – DES DUKPT MAC
        2 – AES DUKPT MAC
        3 – HMAC

        Attribute: n1

      • WorkMode

        public java.lang.String WorkMode
        MAC calculation mode:
        0 - ANSI X9.9
        1 - Hypercomm Fast Mode
        2 - ANSI X9.19.
        3 - SHA1 (HMAC Only)
        4 - SHA256 (HMAC Only)

        Attribute: n1

      • KeySlot

        public java.lang.String KeySlot
        Key slot for encryption.
        For HMAC, can be empty or 1. Empty value means key slot 1 too.
        Other MAC types, it can be in range [1, 99].

        Attribute: n…2

      • Data

        public java.lang.String Data
        Data to be encrypted.
        Must be in hexadecimal format before hash.
        If hashing multiple strings, use “|” to separate.
        If need to hash sensitive card data, please use place holder in the format:
        ${VARIABLE_NAME}.
        VARIABLE_NAME valid values:
        All the VARIBLE in Custom Data, CUSTOMDATA – It can be a replacement for the data in Custom Data field.

        Attribute: var

    • Constructor Detail

      • CustomMACInformation

        public CustomMACInformation()
